name: Fat Free Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cocoa, salt, and sugar together.
2. Add milk and corn syrup.
3. Boil the mixture until it forms a soft ball in cold water.
4. Turn off the heat and beat well with a hand mixer until it starts to thicken. Do not overbeat!
5. Stir in Grape Nuts and vanilla.
6. Spray a 9-inch glass baking dish.
7. Pour the fudge into the dish and let it harden.
8. Cut into squares when set.
